disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Spontaneous, continuous gum bleeding that began this afternoon without brushing or any injury
trigger_question_examples: Where is the bleeding coming from and did anything set it off?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My gums just started bleeding this afternoon on their own — I didn't brush hard or bump them, and it keeps oozing no matter what I do.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: High fever and sore throat for the past three days
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or infections recently?
How have you felt over the last few days?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had a high fever and a sore throat for about three days now, and I just feel hot and shivery.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound fatigue and feeling drained developing over the past week
trigger_question_examples: When did you last feel well?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been getting more and more exhausted over the past week — I can barely get out of the chair.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New pinpoint red spots and bruises on the lower legs and raised purple patches on the forearm
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any rash, spots or bruises on your skin?
Are there marks on your legs or arms?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, I've got little red dots and bruises coming up on my lower legs, and a couple of raised purple patches on my left forearm.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dull aching pain felt in the middle of the breastbone
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any pain anywhere?
Any aches in your chest or bones?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: There's a dull ache right in the middle of my chest bone that I've noticed today.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feeling faint on standing and a racing, pounding heartbeat
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or lightheaded?
Does your heart feel like it is racing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I stand up I feel like I might pass out, and my heart feels like it is pounding and racing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not taking any blood thinners, aspirin or anti-inflammatory medicines
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any blood thinners, aspirin or anti-inflammatories?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I'm not on any blood thinners or aspirin or anti-inflammatory tablets.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one present to help or observe
trigger_question_examples: Is anyone with you at home?
Who is around to help you?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own — there's nobody here with me right now.
